title: Pilot cohort uses the bank; readiness/pass outcomes recorded (anonymous, voluntary, aggregate)
context: The closed loop - the deed - is a pilot cohort actually using the bank to prepare, with anonymous, voluntary, aggregate readiness and pass outcomes recorded. Privacy is non-negotiable: never touch immigration status or PII. Driven by a secured partner (TO BE SECURED).
objective: Run a pilot cohort on the bank and record anonymous, voluntary, aggregate readiness/pass outcomes with the partner's confirmation.
acceptanceCriteria: A pilot cohort (>= 50 learners target) uses the bank; an anonymous, opt-in pre/post survey records readiness improvement (>= 60% target); voluntary, anonymous pass reports collected where ethically possible (never touching immigration status or PII)
Outcomes recorded with the partner's confirmation; non-official/non-advice labeling upheld
